EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - Contract Offer
EmailTemplate.subject: Alliance Rural & Remote Health - Contract Offer
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
CONTRACT OFFER.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
We'd like to offer you the following contract:
[Contract details]
Please review the following documents: [BFIPOL - Canecllation and refunds] [BFIPOL - Travel Nurses] [SREFRM - Contract offer condistions]
If you have any questions at all you can always call us on 07 4998 5550.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Rural & Remote Health
